query:
-- Mark the 5 active projects that are 60-180 days old as stale
-- (pipeline step 23 didn't run because last night's run failed)
UPDATE projects
SET 
  lifecycleStatus = 'stale',
  staleReason = 'No source corroboration for 60+ days (manual catch-up 2026-06-18, pipeline run 2100001 failed)'
WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND keepFlag = 0
  AND COALESCE(sourceLastSeenAt, lastActivityAt, createdAt) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
  AND COALESCE(sourceLastSeenAt, lastActivityAt, createdAt) >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
  AND id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT projectId FROM pipelineClaims WHERE status != 'lost');

-- Verify result
SELECT lifecycleStatus, COUNT(*) as count FROM projects GROUP BY lifecycleStatus ORDER BY count DESC;

UPDATE projects

  lifecycleStatus = 'stale',
  staleReason = 'No source corroboration for 60+ days (manual catch-up 2026-06-18, pipeline run 2100001 failed)'
WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND keepFlag = 0
  AND COALESCE(sourceLastSeenAt, lastActivityAt, createdAt) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
  AND COALESCE(sourceLastSeenAt, lastActivityAt, createdAt) >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
  AND id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT projectId FROM pipelineClaims WHERE status != 'lost');
